summary: The implementation demonstrates excellent alignment with requirements. All 17 requirements have been implemented with proper functionality. The dark-themed UI with 11 feature cards is present, Internet Identity authentication is integrated, Motoko backend methods handle global counter, leaderboard, and image upload with stable storage, and all feature cards display appropriate status badges. The visual theme avoids blue/purple as requested and uses a custom color palette with chart colors.

hallucinated_features.description: User profile system with name storage and retrieval methods (getCallerUserProfile, getUserProfile, saveCallerUserProfile) in Motoko backend
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention user profile functionality. The backend includes profile storage and the frontend has ProfileSetup component, which were not requested in any requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: Access control and authorization system with admin roles and permission checks throughout the backend
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest specifies authentication via Internet Identity but does not request role-based access control, admin systems, or permission-based authorization checks wrapping every backend method.
